milestone_focus_summary: Demonstrate governance-compliant future work proposal publication without introducing another ad hoc issue seeding path.
why_it_matters: Future roadmap work should pass through one governance-aware publication path so labels, blockers, budget posture, and milestone targeting stay disciplined.
acceptance_criteria: Render an issue body that follows the current backlog publication and governance template.
Run the governance preflight before any publish step.
Resolve milestone targeting from the stable milestone title/code instead of a guessed GitHub number.
design_corrections_folded_in: Uses one governed proposal path instead of manual issue seeding and guessed milestone numbers.
notes: This sample remains render-only and exists to prove the proposal tool chain.

execution_order.instruction: Example execution ordering only; replace with real sequencing when used for publication.
